items.briefing:
A critical vulnerability in a WordPress plugin called WP2Shell is putting millions of websites at risk of being taken over by attackers remotely — if your organisation runs a WordPress site, check with your web team immediately to ensure the plugin is not installed. Separately, business email compromise (BEC) phishing attacks are becoming harder to detect, with criminals combining multiple tricks to bypass security filters and trick staff into transferring money or sharing sensitive information.

Iran has also been reported using AI to run faster and more sophisticated cyber and influence operations, a reminder that the threat landscape is evolving quickly. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected email requesting a payment or urgent action — even from a known contact — verify it by phone before acting.

featured.title: Australia lags on AI governance as adoption races ahead
featured.quote: Australian organisations lag dangerously behind in AI governance while adoption accelerates rapidly.
